title: Canadian Biryani with Spicy Chilli Crust
description: A flavorful and spicy twist on traditional biryani, topped with a crunchy Canadian crust.
instructions: Cook the biryani rice according to package instructions.
In a pan, heat 1 tbsp of oil and sauté the green chilli and garlic until fragrant.
Add the green chilli sauce and stir well.
Mix the cooked biryani rice with the spicy green chilli mixture.
Transfer the rice mixture to a baking dish and top with crumbled Canadian cheese.
Bake in the oven for 5-7 minutes or until the cheese is golden brown.
Serve hot and garnish with additional green chilies if desired.
